## 🤖 Telegram Bot Skill (`SKILL.md`)

This skill enables **ZeroClaw** to interface with the Telegram Bot API (2026 Edition), supporting advanced agentic commerce, real-time streaming, and rich UI interactions.

### 🛠 Core Capabilities

* **Threaded Agentic Conversations:** Manage multiple context-aware topics in parallel using `message_thread_id`.
* **LLM Stream Support:** Push partial message updates to users as they are generated by the agent.
* **Sovereign Payments:** Integration with **Telegram Stars** for digital goods and "Paid Gifts" as part of the agentic economy.
* **Mini App Orchestration:** Launch and communicate with high-fidelity web interfaces using the `WebApp` API.

### 📡 API Reference (Latest Features)

| Method / Field | Feature | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `createForumTopic` | **Private Topics** | Bots can now create topics in private chats for organized agent tasks. |
| `can_edit_tag` | **Member Tags** | Permission to manage custom titles/tags for group members. |
| `message_effect_id` | **Visual Effects** | Add premium animations to forwarded or copied messages. |
| `UserRating` | **Reputation** | Access and display user ratings within `ChatFullInfo`. |
| `streaming_reply` | **AI Response** | (Bot API 9.4+) Field for delivering real-time LLM token streams. |

### 📝 Markdown Implementation Guide

To send formatted content, use `parse_mode: "MarkdownV2"`. Ensure special characters (`_`, `*`, `[`, `]`, `(`, `)`, `~`, ```, `>`, `#`, `+`, `-`, `=`, `|`, `{`, `}`, `.`, `!`) are escaped with a backslash `\` if not used for formatting.

#### Sample Payload for `sendMessage`:

```json
{
  "chat_id": "USER_ID",
  "text": "*Agent Status:* Active ✅\n\n_Task:_ Tokenizing RWA via `tiktag.app`\n[View Settlement](https://tiktag.app)",
  "parse_mode": "MarkdownV2",
  "reply_markup": {
    "inline_keyboard": [
      [{"text": "Launch Wallet", "web_app": {"url": "https://tiko.wallet"}}]
    ]
  }
}

```

### 🔐 Security & Constraints

* **Token Safety:** Never hardcode your `BOT_TOKEN`. Use `~/.zeroclaw/config` environment variables.
* **Rate Limits:** High-frequency agents should use a **Local Bot API Server** to bypass the standard 30 msg/sec limit.
* **Media Size:** Standard limit 50MB via API; up to 2000MB (2GB) when using a local server.
